briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether the STATUSANA register is present.

detaileddescription.para: Error while starting the LFXO in PIERCE mode.
Error detected while LFXO was running.

briefdescription.para: LFXO events.
LFXO interrupts.
LFXO modes.
Power up control.
Function for retrieving the address of the specified event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
LFXO Event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specified event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the specified event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_lfxo_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_lfxo_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_lfxo_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of pending interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: States of pending interrupt are saved as a bitmask. One set at particular position means that interrupt for event is pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Bitmask with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_lfxo_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting LFXO status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with LFXO status.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking status of analog module READY signal.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The signal is logic 1.
The signal is logic 0.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking status of analog module SETTLED signal.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The signal is logic 1.
The signal is logic 0.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting internal capacitive load value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting internal capacitive load value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Capacitance value in pF, resolution: 1pF.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting amplitude control configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with amplitude control configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting amplitude control configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure with amplitude control configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for power control set.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power up control.

briefdescription.para: Function setting LFXO mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Oscillator mode.
High performance mode enable.
